title: aragallus montanus
intro: Aragallus montanus, also known as mountain senna, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and to treat various gastrointestinal issues. The medicinal properties of Aragallus montanus are attributed to its ability to stimulate bowel movements and reduce inflammation, offering health benefits such as relief from constipation, digestive issues, and skin conditions like eczema. Aragallus montanus can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
